patches.hypothesis: Adding getters and setters for Arcbasics manages to fix the test without affecting other parts of the code, fixing the root cause of the overfitting.
patches.original_hypothesis: The method was not returning 0 for the same mock object, but instead returning 1. This was fixed by changing the return value to 0 for the same object.

patches.hypothesis: The bug is caused by the `compareTo()` method returning 1 instead of 0 when the two compared objects are the same. This is inconsistent with the `equals()` method, which returns true when comparing the same object.
